title: Thurin Architecte
subtitle: Showcase website & admin interface
description: Custom development of the website for architect Nicolas Thurin, from initial design to production deployment.
frontend: The application is built with Next.js using a server-side rendering approach. The interface is styled with styled-components and adapted to different screen sizes with Tailwind.
backend: NestJS API with JWT authentication and secure password hashing using Argon2. Data is stored in PostgreSQL with TypeORM. A dedicated admin interface allows the management of projects and their media.
deployment: The application is deployed on a manually configured VPS. The infrastructure includes backup management and a setup designed for production stability.
